creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 157359
i2p.in

--- i2p.in.orig 2015-07-29 19:37:50.000000000 +0300
+++ i2p.in      2015-07-29 19:38:05.000000000 +0300
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 # Add the following lines to /etc/rc.conf to enable i2p:
 #
 # i2p_enable="YES"
-# i2p_user
+# Default user _i2p

 . /etc/rc.subr

@@ -83,6 +83,6 @@

 load_rc_config "${name}"
 : ${i2p_enable="NO"}
-: ${i2p_user=""}
+: ${i2p_user="_i2p"}

 run_rc_command "$1"
